title: Pubs, Clubs, Bars
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the words 'pubs, clubs and bars'?

What's your favourite pun / club / bar and why?
What do you dislike about pubs, clubs and bars?

What do you think the opening and closing times of pubs, clubs and bars should be?
Should there be an age limit for pubs, clubs and bars?
What are the alternatives to pubs, clubs and bars?
What's the difference between a pub, a club and a bar?
What do you think of the names given to pubs, clubs and bars?
What changes would you like to see in pubs, clubs and bars?
What do you think of pub grub (pub food)?

Do you think smoking should be banned in pubs, clubs and bars?
